_info.description: Quest System Configuration for Mission Impossible Mod

Easy (Pilgrim).example: If daily quest requires 4 sticks, easy mode requires 2 sticks.

Normal (Stalker/Voyager).example: No modification - amounts are exactly as specified.

Hard (Interloper/Misery).example: If daily quest requires 4 sticks, hard mode requires 8 sticks.

daily.description: Small daily tasks, regenerate every in-game day at 9 AM

weekly.description: Medium weekly tasks, regenerate every 7 in-game days

monthly.description: Large monthly tasks, regenerate every 30 in-game days

how_to_customize.enable_disable_items: Set enabled to true/false for each variant
how_to_customize.disable_quest_type: Delete the daily/weekly/monthly entry to disable that type for an item
how_to_customize.example_monthly_only: Keep only the monthly variant entry, delete daily and weekly
